title: María Terremoto at the Teatre Principal de Maó
description: Flamenco singer María Terremoto, from Jerez, opens the Teatre Principal de Maó's summer programme on 2 July with 'Manifiesto', the album honoured with the 2025 Premio Andalucía de la Cultura en Flamenco. Deep-rooted flamenco in Spain's oldest opera house.
